channel.title: Murder By The Book
channel.description: Upcoming events for Murder By The Book

item.title: Christina Dodd in conversation with Angelina M. Lopez
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

Christina Dodd is a New York Times bestselling author whose suspense, paranormal, historical, and mystery novels have been translated into 30 languages and sold more than 15 million copies in print...

Event details
